---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new hook or enhancement for CCSkills
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of what problem this feature would solve.

**Example:** I'm always frustrated when Claude accidentally runs [dangerous command]...

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like:

1. What type of hook? (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PermissionRequest, Stop)
2. What should it do?
3. How should it behave?

## Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

**Example:** When working with [technology], Claude sometimes [unwanted behavior]...

## Hook Type Suggestion

Which hook type would this use?

- [ ] PreToolUse (block/modify commands before execution)
- [ ] PostToolUse (process after execution)
- [ ] PermissionRequest (notify on permission requests)
- [ ] Stop (cleanup/notify on session end)

## Additional Context

Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
